title: Is fatigue impairing your decision-making?
body: "Safety flyer issued with the investigation report into the grounding and subsequent loss of the prawn trawler Sustain (UL 45) on Rubha Camas a’ Mhaoraich, Loch Broom, Scotland on 16 November 2023.  The document summarises the circumstances of the accident and provides multiple safety considerations for members of the fishing community.  This information has been prepared for the:   fishing industry   Related publication  An investigation report has also been prepared for this accident. "
